name: ai-project-manager
description: AI-driven project management system with Jira integration

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:jira" "npm run dev:calendar"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:services
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:services
scripts.test:services: cd services/gateway && npm test && cd ../jira-integration && npm test

author: AI Project Manager Team
